title: pelargonium × trilloniae
intro: Pelargonium × trilloniae, also known as Trillium Geranium or Geranium Trillium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and anxiety, due to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × trilloniae include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × trilloniae typically include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to stress and anxiety.
